title: Darkness
description: This plugin adds a darkness mechanic that will make life harder and the game more horror.
body:
This plugin adds a darkness mechanic that will make life harder and the game more hardcore (especially early on). However, there's a flashlight that makes things easier, crafted from 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

4 redstone, 4 iron, and glowstone.

</details>

 I'd like you to figure out the plugin yourselves and feel the spirit of uncertainty, real horror. Glow berries also help against darkness, but only temporarily.

Also, this plugin works really well with other horror plugins or datapacks, like From The Fog (recommended).
